keycloak.description:
keycloak database and user configuration
I believe these keycloak values should be here in the values file as it centralizes 
user management and we can point to the db.init.config key with customers and let them have at it

Database migration configuration
Controls database schema migration operations using Goose migration tool

enabled.description: Whether to automatically hydrate embedding model data
enabled.title: enabled

models.description:
Needs to be seperated by platform at some point... not today
List of model names to hydrate
Examples:
  - "ibm-granite/granite-embedding-30m-english"
  - "prdev/mini-gte"
  - "sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2"
  - "nomic-ai/nomic-embed-text-v2-moe"
  - "ibm-granite/granite-embedding-107m-multilingual"
  - "sentence-transformers/distiluse-base-multilingual-cased-v2"
models.title: models

annotations.description:
Annotations applied to all ingress resources
Default nginx annotations are defined in templates/ingress/_nginx.tpl
Add annotations here to override defaults or add new ones

Ingress controller class name
If not set, defaults are used based on classType

domain.description:
Default domain/host for ingress resources
If not set, each chart uses its own host configuration

Type of Kubernetes resource used to store trusted certificates
Be aware that when managing these with trust-manager, it requires some explicit configuration to work with the operator.
Refer to the documentation for more details: https://cert-manager.io/docs/trust/trust-manager/installation/#enable-secret-targets
